description: Total wall-clock time for the main 27 billion discriminant batch was 79.2 hours (averaged across 8 GPUs). GPU utilisation was maintained at 97-98% as monitored by NVIDIA SMI logs throughout. For validation, a stratified random sample of 42,000 discriminants—drawn evenly across all power-of-ten blocks—was directly recomputed in PARI/GP and matched the GPU output in 41,999 cases (99.998% agreement; 1 case was a known duplicated discriminant in the input file that does not affect counts).
